edge_legend.TOP_EDGE: PP edge +1.0+ or strong avg vs weak opponent (ATP rank 100+).
edge_legend.OK_EDGE: Positive PP edge or solid vs average opponent (rank 26–99).
edge_legend.NEUTRAL: No clear edge, or elite opponent with only modest PP edge.
edge_legend.AVOID: Negative PP edge or elite opponent (rank ≤25) with weak production.
